# lemonsqueezy-billing

> The missing billing layer for Lemon Squeezy. Auto-discover stores/products, create checkout sessions, handle webhooks — one function call.

## Docs
- [README](./README.md): Full documentation, API reference, and examples
- [Types](./src/types.ts): All TypeScript interfaces and type definitions

## Examples
- [Quick Start](./README.md#quick-start): Initialize billing and create your first checkout

## Optional
- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup and guidelines
- [Changelog](./CHANGELOG.md): Version history
